name: Chicken Millicent
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the chicken in the cooker.
2. Combine the spaghetti mix and wine, then pour over the chicken.
3. Cover and cook for about 4-6 hours on low heat.
4. Turn the control to HIGH, add the tomatoes and mushrooms.
5. Cover and cook for 30-40 minutes until the tomatoes are done.
